result.summary: Found 3 issues: one major layout overlap problem, one accessibility concern with fine print text, and one minor content truncation issue.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' sticky bar is overlapping the legal disclaimer/fine print text at the bottom of the page, making portions of the required legal text unreadable.
issues.suggestion: Reposition the 'SCROLL DOWN' prompt above the fine print section, or ensure the sticky element does not overlap important legal content. Add sufficient bottom padding to the disclaimer text to account for the sticky bar height.

issues.description: The legal disclaimer/fine print text is extremely small and low contrast against the white background, making it nearly illegible, especially on mobile screens.
issues.suggestion: Increase font size to at least 12px for legal text and ensure sufficient color contrast ratio (minimum 4.5:1 for normal text) to meet WCAG AA accessibility standards.

issues.description: The fine print text appears to be cut off on both the left and right edges, suggesting it may be overflowing its container or lacking proper padding/margins.
issues.suggestion: Add appropriate horizontal padding to the fine print container to ensure all text is fully visible within the viewport boundaries.
